packages.title: Tender Synopsis Agent Package
packages.shortDescription: Package for Tender Synopsis Agent resources
packages.description: An AI agent that fetches SAP PPS Sourcing Projects, detects country-specific portal requirements, generates a compliant tender synopsis, and supports human review before publication.

agents.title: Tender Synopsis Agent
agents.shortDescription: An AI agent that fetches SAP PPS Sourcing Projects, detects country-specific portal requirements, generates a compliant tender synopsis, and supports human review before publication.
agents.description: The Tender Synopsis Agent automates the creation of country-compliant tender notices from SAP PPS Sourcing Projects. It detects the procuring entity country via CompanyCode, applies the correct portal format (eProcure, SAM.gov, TED, Etimad), generates a structured synopsis using Claude AI, and supports human review before publication via the A2A protocol.
